narrative:
Precinct New Phila 3-C (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 383 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.6 percentage points.
